text.tspan: Kalypso Core RGD: Schema & Instantiated Resources Map
(Core, PodSpec, ServiceAccount, ConfigMap, Secret, Deployment, StatefulSet, DaemonSet, HPA, PDB, NetworkPolicy, Role, ClusterRole)
• PodSpec is a helper RGD that resolves service accounts, environment config, secrets, and probes.
• Compute workloads (Deployment, StatefulSet, DaemonSet) are mutually exclusive based on computeType.
• All resources inherit the name and namespacing of the parent Core CR.
